title: antirrhinum latifolium var. intermedium
intro: Antirrhinum latifolium var. intermedium, commonly known as the intermediate or broad-leaved snapdragon, is a variety of flowering plant in the figwort family native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Antirrhinum latifolium var. intermedium include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
